content:
- Entered NOW EXECUTE and ran enforced real-binary target: PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1 cargo test --all-targets ha::e2e_multi_node::e2e_multi_node_real_ha_scenario_matrix (pass).
- Determined no functional gap required source edits because existing ha::e2e_multi_node real pipeline assertions already covered leader/write/process/phase behavior.
- Ran required gates sequentially with pipefail + evidence capture: make check (pass), make test (pass), make test-bdd (pass), make lint (pass).
- Wrote grep artifacts for make test/lint markers (congratulations/evaluation failed), including explicit NOT_FOUND markers where absent.
- Updated task file: acceptance criteria checked, execution checklist completed, status metadata set to done/true/true.
- Added AGENTS.md learning about validating existing enforced real HA e2e coverage before adding duplicate tests.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully; preparing final task-finished commit with all .ralph artifacts.

- Completed task execution end-to-end and committed as 8814568.
- Workspace is clean after commit.
- All mandatory gates passed and task metadata/checklists were finalized before commit.
- Should quit now per instructions.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md after loading progress log; verified all bug tasks currently show <passes>true</passes> and <passing>true</passing>.
- Evaluated non-passing tasks: task 16 is low priority, tasks 19/20/21 are blocked by recurring meta-task chain, and task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation is unblocked with default/normal priority.
- Wrote .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation.md into .ralph/current_task.txt as the most logical next task under current priority/blocker rules.

- Read startup memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and loaded active task path from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Inspected .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation.md; task was at initial state (no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE yet).
- Performed parallel research sweeps across dcs/ha/contract files to map write_path/delete_path coupling and identify exact stub/type touch points.
- Wrote a detailed implementation + verification plan directly into the task file, including file-by-file edits, trait design, test updates, and mandatory gate order.
- Added terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of task file as required.
- Stopping now immediately, so next run should do deep skeptical verification, alter at least one plan item, and then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE if satisfied.
